title: AmmoOS core principles
motto: Simple · informative · secure · protecting — zero tolerance for hostility.

principles.label: Simple
principles.rule: One field, one start menu, one task router. No nested launchers, no duplicate surfaces, no stub programs in the menu.

principles.label: Informative
principles.rule: Every program and task names what it does. Hostess 7 briefs with evidence; panels show status, not mystery.

principles.label: Secure
principles.rule: Ironclad gates, brain guard, logic gate on comms, Monster shell on execution. Virtual workspace before live edits.

principles.label: Protecting
principles.rule: Root mounts, sovereign stack, thermal gate, ELLIE diagnostics — protect operator, stack, and friendlies first.

principles.label: Does not tolerate hostility
principles.rule: Threat panel, attack kit, universal protector, and Hostess 7 truth floor — hostile actors are identified, contained, and removed. No friendly fire.

hostess7_mandate: Brief → Evaluate → Task in virtual space first; promote only after CHIPS die test + testing center pass.
